text:
Hi, my name is Christina, I’m one of the registered pharmacists calling from CenterWell Specialty Pharmacy Patient Management Program. May I speak with Ms. Lopez?

Yes, this is she.

Perfect, thank you. Before we get started, I do want to let you know that for quality assurance we are on a recorded line, and for your privacy, can you verify your year of birth?

1988.

Thank you for that.

I’m calling in regards to your specialty medication Dupixent. As a reminder, we offer clinical support throughout your therapy, including education and side effect management.

If any side effects or product concerns are reported during our call today, is it okay if the manufacturer reaches out to you or your provider for clarification if needed?

Yes, that’s fine.

Great. I’ll go through a few quick questions.

Have there been any changes to your medications?

No, everything is the same.

Any new drug allergies?

No.

How have you been tolerating the medication? Any side effects?

Yeah, I’ve actually been having diarrhea for the past week. It’s been pretty bad, like I’ve had to stay home a couple days because of it.

Okay, thank you for letting me know. Any nausea or vomiting?

A little nausea here and there, but no vomiting.

Got it. Have you needed to take anything to manage the diarrhea?

Yeah, I took Imodium a few times.

Okay. Any tingling, numbness, or other symptoms?

Yeah, I’ve had some tingling in my hands and feet since starting the medication.

Alright. Have you had any ER visits or hospitalizations related to these symptoms?

No, nothing like that.

Any trouble breathing, chest pain, or anything severe?

No.

Okay, thanks for going over that with me. Diarrhea and tingling can occur with this medication. Since it’s starting to affect your daily routine and you needed medication to manage it, I would recommend we notify your provider for follow-up.

If symptoms worsen or you develop anything severe like dehydration, weakness, or need urgent care, please seek medical attention.

Okay, sounds good.

Do you feel comfortable continuing the medication for now?

Yes.

Perfect. We’ll plan to check in with you again in about one month.

We value your feedback and would appreciate it if you could stay on the line after I hang up to complete a short survey.

Thank you for your time today. Have a great evening.

You too.
